title: Relief Extra Care Support Worker
description: Creative Support is a non-profit provider of personalised care and support for people with learning disabilities, mental health needs, autism spectrum conditions, and older people. We are recruiting Relief Extra Care Support Workers to provide person-centred support, promote independence, and help individuals access community activities.

title: Residential Support Worker
description: We are seeking Residential Support Workers to support vulnerable individuals in a residential setting. Duties include assisting with daily living, promoting independence, and ensuring a safe and supportive environment.

title: Relief Support Worker
description: Our services in Leeds are looking for Relief Support Workers to provide flexible support to individuals with learning disabilities and mental health needs. You will support service users to engage with their community and maintain independent living skills.

title: Relief Support Worker
description: Our Bradford services are recruiting Relief Support Workers to deliver high-quality care and support to individuals with diverse needs, enabling them to live independently and achieve personal goals.

title: Crisis Support Worker
description: Do you have the passion to support individuals experiencing mental health crises? As a Crisis Support Worker, you will provide responsive, person-centred support and work collaboratively with healthcare professionals.

title: Support Worker
description: Support Workers are required to assist individuals with daily living, personal care, and social inclusion. You will work as part of a team to provide consistent, high-quality care.

title: Residential Support Workers
description: Academics are recruiting Residential Support Workers to work in specialist settings supporting young people and vulnerable individuals with behavioural and emotional needs.

title: Support Worker
description: We are looking for Support Workers in Wakefield to provide person-centred support, encourage independence, and assist individuals with daily living tasks and community engagement.

title: Relief Support Worker
description: Creative Support are recruiting Relief Support Workers in Wakefield to deliver flexible support across services, promoting independence and wellbeing for service users.
